text: 30. Subcontractor shall furnish and install all caulking at countertop to backsplash joints and at adjacent surfaces to countertop. Caulking color to be approved by the Project design team. Subcontractor shall also be responsible for caulking at all joints where countertops abut other quartz/stone. Caulking at joints between countertops and tile or drywall/paint shall be provided by others.
